---
title: "CV"
toc: false
---

My research applies quantitative magnetic resonance enterography to inflammatory bowel disease, with an emphasis on segment-level modelling, calibration, and reproducibility. This page is the full record: appointments, education, publications and presentations, software, and technical skills.

## Research *appointments*

::: {.worklist}

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Research Associate, Abdominal Imaging and AI · Department of Radiology, Shariati Hospital, Tehran University of Medical Sciences]{.worklist-title}
[Jan 2024 – present]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
Supervisor: Prof Amir Reza Radmard. International collaboration with UCL/Motilent partners.

- Led quantitative MRE research in IBD with a focus on ulcerative colitis: GIQuant motility, bowel wall activity markers, chronicity features, and segment-level validation against endoscopy.
- Coordinated collaboration with Motilent and academic partners, aligning feature definitions, QC, and analysis plans across sites.
- Built reproducible data and modelling pipelines integrating imaging, structured radiology features, narrative reports, and clinical or laboratory endpoints.
- Developed report-structured workflows, including LLM-assisted extraction where appropriate, to support scalable research data capture from routine radiology text.
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Research Assistant, Imaging and Clinical Data Science · Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences]{.worklist-title}
[Sep 2022 – Dec 2023]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
- Supported CT and MRI research projects spanning protocol review, dataset construction, and statistical analysis.
- Performed diagnostic pathway analyses integrating imaging and clinical data to evaluate system-level outcomes.
- Contributed to PanCanAID-related pipelines including curated datasets and semi-automated CT segmentation workflows.
:::
:::

:::

## *Education*

::: {.worklist}

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Doctor of Medicine (MD) · Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences]{.worklist-title}
[2015 – 2022]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
Awarded on full scholarship.
:::
:::

:::

## Oral *presentations*

::: {.pub-entry}
[Non-invasive Triage of Ulcerative Colitis Activity: A Bayesian Risk Stratification Model Integrating MR Enterography and Fecal Calprotectin]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Menys A, Torabi A, Bhatnagar G, Colombel JF, Radmard AR, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*ESGAR 2026* -- Oral presentation. Presenting author.]{.pub-venue}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Colonic motility MRI as a quantitative biomarker in ulcerative colitis: validation against endoscopic disease activity]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Menys A, Torabi A, Bhatnagar G, Colombel JF, Radmard AR, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*ESGAR 2026* -- Oral presentation. Presenting author.]{.pub-venue}
:::

## Posters

::: {.pub-entry}
[Decreased colonic peristalsis assessed with motility MRI is associated with chronic structural damage as well as disease activity against the Mayo Endoscopic Subscore]{.pub-title}

[Menys A, **Sarikhani M**, Torabi A, Kolahdoozan S, Bhatnagar G, Colombel JF, Radmard AR, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*ECCO 2026* -- Poster.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1093/ecco-jcc/jjaf231.519)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Quantitative assessment of colon motility in ulcerative colitis using MRE: correlation with endoscopic disease activity]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Naim I, Torabi A, Kolahdoozan S, Nouri Najafabadi A, Radmard AR, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*ECCO 2025* -- Poster. Presenting author.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1093/ecco-jcc/jjae190.0729)
:::
:::

## Manuscripts *in preparation*

::: {.pub-entry}
[Decreased colonic peristalsis assessed with motility MRI is associated with chronic structural damage as well as disease activity against the Mayo Endoscopic Subscore]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Menys A, Torabi A, Amouei M, Vahedi Tafreshi H, Sima AR, Naim I, Kolahdoozan S, Bhatnagar G, Colombel JF, Radmard AR.]{.pub-authors}

[Based on ECCO 2026 and ESGAR 2026 accepted abstracts.]{.pub-venue}
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Performance loss of quantized large language models in medicine: parameter optimisation and evaluation]{.pub-title}

[Khalafi MA, et al., **Sarikhani M**.]{.pub-authors}

[Manuscript in preparation.]{.pub-venue}
:::

## Peer-reviewed *articles*

::: {.pub-entry}
[Large language models versus classical machine learning performance in COVID-19 mortality prediction using high-dimensional tabular data]{.pub-title}

[Ghaffarzadeh-Esfahani M, Salahi-Niri A, Mohsenzadeh-Kermani A, **Sarikhani M**, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*Scientific Reports*. 2025;15:42712.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-025-26705-7)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Diagnostic accuracy of Ottawa Knee Rule for diagnosis of fracture in patients with knee trauma: a systematic review and meta-analysis]{.pub-title}

[Kazemi SM, Khorram R, **Sarikhani M**, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[*Archives of Academic Emergency Medicine*. 2023;11(1):e30.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.22037/aaem.v11i1.1934)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[Global, regional, and national burden of cardiovascular diseases and risk factors in 204 countries and territories, 1990-2023]{.pub-title}

[Global Burden of Cardiovascular Diseases and Risks 2023 Collaborators (including **Sarikhani M**).]{.pub-authors}

[*Journal of the American College of Cardiology*. 2025;86 (22), 2167-2243.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://www.jacc.org/doi/full/10.1016/j.jacc.2025.08.015)
:::
:::

## Book *chapters*

::: {.pub-entry}
[SWOT analysis of the integration of MRI in cardiology]{.pub-title}

[**Sarikhani M**, Aarabi A, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[In: Ghaffari Jolfayi A (ed.). *Navigating Cardiology's Future*. Springer; 2025. p.115--128.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-981-95-0313-1_7)
:::
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[The role of AI and cardiac MRI in identifying inflammatory heart disease]{.pub-title}

[Ghoshouni H, **Sarikhani M**, et al.]{.pub-authors}

[In: Ghaffari Jolfayi A (ed.). *Navigating Cardiology's Future*. Springer; 2025. p.103--114.]{.pub-venue}

::: {.pub-links}
[DOI](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-981-95-0313-1_6)
:::
:::

## Software and open-science *outputs*

*All software listed here is research code intended for transparent evaluation, not clinical deployment.*

::: {.worklist}

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Lémann Index Calculator](https://github.com/MahshadSa/lemann-li-app){.worklist-title}
[Streamlit]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
Computes cumulative structural bowel-damage (Lémann) scores in Crohn's disease across segments and modalities. [GitHub](https://github.com/MahshadSa/lemann-li-app) · [Zenodo DOI](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17514287)
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[UC MRE Activity Risk Stratification Tool](https://github.com/MahshadSa/uc-mre-activity-risk-stratifier){.worklist-title}
[ESGAR 2026]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
Bayesian risk-stratification tool for non-invasive triage of ulcerative colitis activity, associated with the ESGAR 2026 oral presentation. [GitHub](https://github.com/MahshadSa/uc-mre-activity-risk-stratifier) · [Zenodo DOI](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18171573)
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[radiology-clip-mini](https://github.com/MahshadSa/radiology-clip-mini){.worklist-title}
[vision-language]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
A compact CLIP-style vision-language baseline for radiology image-text pairs. [GitHub](https://github.com/MahshadSa/radiology-clip-mini)
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[ct-phrase-retrieval](https://github.com/MahshadSa/ct-phrase-retrieval00){.worklist-title}
[retrieval / NLP]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
Phrase-level retrieval over CT radiology report text. [GitHub](https://github.com/MahshadSa/ct-phrase-retrieval00)
:::
:::

:::

## Methods and technical *skills*

| Area | Detail |
|------|--------|
| Core statistics | Multilevel and hierarchical modelling (partial pooling, priors, posterior predictive checks); leakage-aware validation for clustered clinical data; decision-curve analysis; calibration. |
| Programming | Python: pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, PyTorch; reproducible workflows (Jupyter, VS Code, Git). |
| Medical AI and imaging | Deep learning for medical imaging (PyTorch, MONAI); CLIP-style vision-language models; quantitative MRE feature operationalisation (motility and bowel wall markers); DICOM preprocessing (pydicom). |
| LLM and NLP | LLM-assisted information extraction from radiology reports; agentic pipeline design with human-in-the-loop escalation. |
| Research software | Modular repo structure; versioned releases with DOIs; Streamlit clinician-facing prototypes; Figma for workflow schematics. |

## Clinical *practice*

::: {.worklist}

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[General Practitioner · Valiasr Local Medical Center, Alborz, Iran]{.worklist-title}
[Aug 2022 – Aug 2024]{.worklist-date}
:::
::: {.worklist-meta}
Part-time during transition to full-time research in 2024.
:::
:::

::: {.worklist-row}
::: {.worklist-head}
[Medical Intern · Teaching Hospitals (SBMU), Tehran, Iran]{.worklist-title}
[May 2020 – May 2022]{.worklist-date}
:::
:::

:::

## Peer *review*

- *Frontiers in Public Health*: thyroid cancer cost prediction (ML). 2024.
- *Journal of Medical Internet Research*: human-centred design in pancreatic cancer networks. 2024.

---

*For complete records, see my [Google Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iKhNW9AAAAAJ).*
